data.title: Sprint SKILL.md Phase 1: 3-layer clarity gate
data.description:
Edit plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md Phase 1 section — insert 3-layer clarity gate after "Validate Primary Ticket".

## Clarity Gate Logic (SC1, SC2, SC3, SC4)
Layer 1: Run ticket-clarity-check.sh <id>
  - Pass (exit 0) -> proceed to preplanning/routing
  - Fail (exit 1) or absent -> fall through to Layer 2
  - Error (exit 2) -> fall through to Layer 2 with warning

Layer 2: Reuse complexity evaluator scope_certainty
  - High or Medium -> pass, proceed
  - Low or unrecognized value -> escalate to Layer 3
  - Unavailable (API key absent, agent failure) -> Layer 3 with warning

Layer 3: User escalation via AskUserQuestion
  - (a) Investigate via /dso:fix-bug (bug-typed tickets only)
  - (b) Enrich via /dso:brainstorm
  - (c) Proceed anyway

## .test-index
Remove all remaining Task 3 RED markers (clarity gate and escalation tests now pass).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] "clarity gate" or "Clarity Gate" appears in SKILL.md Phase 1
  Verify: grep -qi "clarity gate" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] ticket-clarity-check.sh referenced in Phase 1
  Verify: grep -q "ticket-clarity-check" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] scope_certainty referenced as Layer 2
  Verify: grep -q "scope_certainty" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] All 3 escalation options present
  Verify: count=$(grep -c "fix-bug\|brainstorm\|proceed" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md); test "$count" -ge 3
- [ ] AskUserQuestion present in escalation section
  Verify: grep -q "AskUserQuestion" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Task 3 RED markers fully removed from .test-index
  Verify: { grep "sprint/SKILL.md" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q "\["; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
